---
title: "Tau Mutant Integration"
author: "Emir Turkes"
format:
  html:
    theme: theme.scss        # crimson primary + links + IBM Plex (Sans body, Serif headings, Mono code; inlined offline)
    embed-resources: true    # inline CSS/JS -> ONE self-contained offline HTML file
    lightbox: auto           # dense figures are clickable in the offline HTML
    toc: true
    code-fold: true          # analysis code present but collapsed (v1's code_folding: hide)
    code-tools: true
---

# Overview

```{r}
#| label: overview-setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
})
options(warn = 2)
targets::tar_source()
targets::tar_load(report_visuals)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
theme_set(theme_tau())

rv <- report_visuals
spine_nodes <- rv$report_spine_schematic$nodes
spine_edges <- rv$report_spine_schematic$edges
spine_coords <- data.frame(
  node = c("inputs", "qc", "microglia", "trajectory", "mechanism",
           "crossmodality", "environment"),
  x = c(1, 2, 2, 3.4, 3.4, 4.9, 3.4),
  y = c(2.6, 3.25, 2.25, 2.95, 2.25, 2.6, 0.85),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
spine_nodes$x <- spine_coords$x[match(spine_nodes$node, spine_coords$node)]
spine_nodes$y <- spine_coords$y[match(spine_nodes$node, spine_coords$node)]
spine_edges$x <- spine_coords$x[match(spine_edges$from, spine_coords$node)]
spine_edges$y <- spine_coords$y[match(spine_edges$from, spine_coords$node)]
spine_edges$xend <- spine_coords$x[match(spine_edges$to, spine_coords$node)]
spine_edges$yend <- spine_coords$y[match(spine_edges$to, spine_coords$node)]
stopifnot(
  all(is.finite(spine_nodes$x)),
  all(is.finite(spine_nodes$y)),
  all(is.finite(spine_edges$x)),
  all(is.finite(spine_edges$y)),
  all(is.finite(spine_edges$xend)),
  all(is.finite(spine_edges$yend))
)

spine_colours <- c(
  input = "#3F5A6B",
  gate = "#6B7A3F",
  chapter = "#B0344D",
  summary = "#7C5A86",
  reproducibility = "#777777"
)
```

Visual-first report: QC first, result chapters after.

```{r}
#| label: fig-report-spine-schematic
#| fig-width: 8.2
#| fig-height: 3.8
#| fig-cap: "Report spine: compact targets feed the visual audit."
ggplot() +
  geom_segment(
    data = spine_edges,
    aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend),
    colour = "#777777",
    linewidth = 0.45,
    arrow = grid::arrow(length = grid::unit(0.08, "inches"))
  ) +
  geom_label(
    data = spine_nodes,
    aes(x, y, label = label, fill = kind),
    linewidth = 0.25,
    label.r = grid::unit(0.08, "lines"),
    size = 3.2,
    colour = "white"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = spine_colours, guide = "none") +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(0.6, 5.25), ylim = c(0.55, 3.5), clip = "off") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(6, 20, 6, 20))
```

{{< include _qc.qmd >}}

{{< include _microglia.qmd >}}

{{< include _trajectory.qmd >}}

{{< include _mechanism.qmd >}}

{{< include _crossmodality.qmd >}}
